projects.title: Real-Time Arbitrage Detection Engine
projects.description: Cross-platform trading system integrating Polymarket and Kalshi exchanges for identifying arbitrage opportunities in prediction markets.
projects.longDescription: Built a sophisticated real-time arbitrage detection engine that monitors multiple prediction market exchanges simultaneously. The system identifies price discrepancies across platforms and calculates potential profit opportunities, providing traders with actionable insights for cross-platform arbitrage strategies.

projects.title: Trading Platform Charting Module
projects.description: High-performance charting solution with TradingView SDK integration, serving 500K+ active users with real-time market data visualization.
projects.longDescription: Revamped the entire charting infrastructure of a major trading platform, implementing vanilla JavaScript optimizations that improved rendering performance by 20%. Integrated TradingView SDK for advanced charting capabilities while maintaining cross-browser compatibility.

projects.title: Portfolio Management Dashboard
projects.description: Real-time P&L tracking dashboard with position management, interactive charts, and comprehensive portfolio analytics.
projects.longDescription: Designed and developed a comprehensive portfolio management dashboard featuring real-time profit and loss tracking, position management, and interactive data visualizations. Built with a focus on performance and user experience, handling live updates via WebSocket connections.

projects.title: React Component Library
projects.description: Comprehensive UI component library with 50+ reusable components including data tables, charts, filters, and responsive layouts.
projects.longDescription: Architected and built a complete React component library from the ground up, featuring data tables with sorting/filtering, interactive charts, form components, and responsive layout primitives. Designed for maximum reusability and consistency across applications.

projects.title: Web3 Wallet Integration
projects.description: Blockchain wallet connectivity module supporting multiple wallet providers for decentralized application interactions.
projects.longDescription: Implemented Web3 wallet integration supporting multiple providers including MetaMask, WalletConnect, and Coinbase Wallet. Handled wallet state management, transaction signing, and blockchain interactions with proper error handling and user feedback.

projects.title: Enterprise Internal Tools
projects.description: Suite of internal React applications for Bank of America, improving team productivity and operational efficiency.
projects.longDescription: Built and maintained multiple internal React applications at Bank of America through Infosys, focusing on scalability and performance. Implemented code-splitting strategies that improved page load times by 35% and enhanced overall application responsiveness.
